journeys.description: The travelogue of someone who likes to travel. A journal of journeys, if you will.

savior.description: I am a Christ-follower. This is where I write about my journey.

heart.description: Posts full of passion and emotion.

0-s-and-1-s.description: A collection of posts about technology and how it affects us. Beware: many of these articles don't age well.

mind.description: Exploring the life of the mind, how people think and behave.

kicks-and-giggles.description: A little nonsense, now and then, is relished by the wisest men.

eyes.description: Everything from Photoshop to Picasso, Dreamweaver to Dali.

america.description: A once-blessed people now in a steady state of paradox: material increase, moral decline.

retrospection.description: A look back at the days that used to be tomorrow.

ears.description: Music, composition, mixing, tracking and anything else that makes the ears tingle.

miscellany.description: When I'm lazy, I file things here.

family-ties.description: This is where I chronicle the stories of my family.
